entities.name: SMALLHOLDER IRRIGATION SCHEMES
entities.description: Systems of irrigation used by small-scale farmers in Africa

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where the irrigation schemes are located

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The ability of farmers to earn a profit from their irrigation schemes

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of irrigation schemes to be maintained over the long term

entities.name: REVITALISATION
entities.description: The process of bringing new life or vigor to irrigation schemes

entities.name: REOPERATION
entities.description: The process of restarting the operation of irrigation schemes

entities.name: REHABILITATION
entities.description: The process of restoring irrigation schemes to a functional state

entities.description: The social and economic results of irrigation interventions

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL OUTCOMES
entities.description: The ecological results of irrigation interventions

entities.name: IRRIGATION WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in irrigation

entities.name: ON-FARM MONITORING
entities.description: The practice of tracking irrigation and crop data directly on the farm

entities.name: ADAPTIVE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A systematic process for improving management policies and practices by learning from outcomes

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INNOVATION PLATFORMS
entities.description: Collaborative frameworks for developing and scaling agricultural innovations
